title: Context file frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter required on every .context/**/*.md file.

title.description: Human-readable title matching the H1 heading.

type.description: File category — matches the subdirectory (plans/ → plan, findings/ → finding, analysis/ → analysis, known-issues/ → known-issue).

status.description: Lifecycle status. Use draft until reviewed, active for in-progress, done when complete, superseded when replaced.

date.description: Creation date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Do not update on subsequent edits.

related.description: Relative paths to related .context files. Omit the field entirely if there are no related files.

effort.description: T-shirt-sized total implementation effort, matching the skill-auditor remediation-plan convention (S/M/L). Required for type: plan while status is draft or active (enforced by validate-context-frontmatter.sh, not this schema alone, since JSON Schema conditionals aren't evaluated by that validator). Use TBD only when sizing is genuinely blocked on an unresolved item in Open Questions. Not applicable to finding/analysis/instruction/audit. Set once at creation like date; re-size only if scope materially changes.

severity.description: Urgency of a known-issue entry. Required for type: known-issue (enforced by validate-context-frontmatter.sh, not this schema alone). Not applicable to other types. Set once at creation; re-grade only if the issue's real-world impact turns out to differ from the initial assessment.
